dataflows.name: International Financial Statistics
dataflows.description: Monthly, quarterly, and annual data on financial, balance of payments, and macroeconomic indicators for most IMF member countries.

dataflows.name: Fiscal Monitor
dataflows.description: Annual fiscal data on government revenue, expenditure, balances, and debt for advanced economies, emerging markets, and low-income developing countries.

dataflows.name: World Economic Outlook
dataflows.description: Annual and semi-annual projections for key economic indicators including GDP growth, inflation, unemployment, and current account balances.

dataflows.name: Government Finance Statistics
dataflows.description: Comprehensive government finance statistics covering revenue, expense, transactions in assets and liabilities, and other economic flows.

dataflows.name: Balance of Payments
dataflows.description: Balance of payments statistics covering current account, capital account, and financial account transactions.

dataflows.name: Monetary and Financial Statistics
dataflows.description: Monetary survey data, interest rates, and financial indicators for central banks and other depository corporations.
